# MathQuill Assets

Place the following files here:

- `mathquill.min.js`
- `mathquill.css`

Download from: https://github.com/mathquill/mathquill
Or via CDN:

wget https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/[email protected]/build/mathquill.min.js wget https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/[email protected]/build/mathquill.css
